title.zh: Astropy：修复嵌套 CompoundModel 的 separability 矩阵
title.en: Astropy: fix separability matrices for nested CompoundModels

summary.zh: 审查一个 Astropy modeling PR：作者调整了组合模型右侧 block 的填充方式，并补了一个嵌套模型测试。
summary.en: Review an Astropy modeling PR: the author changes how the right-side block is filled for compound models and adds a nested-model test.

reviewTarget.note: The reviewed patch is an AgentCode adapted patch for review training. It is not the upstream maintainer patch unless explicitly stated.

pr.title: Handle nested right-hand models when building separability matrices
pr.author: codegen-agent
body: separability_matrix can produce confusing results when a compound model contains another compound model on the right-hand side. The current block assembly assumes the right operand can always be copied directly, but nested models need every output row to be connected to their inputs in the combined coordinate matrix.

This PR marks the nested right-hand block as dependent on its input columns by filling the target block with 1s. This keeps the combined matrix shape correct and avoids losing the nested model in the parent composition.
Added a nested model regression test using Pix2Sky_TAN with two Linear1D components to verify the combined separability matrix has the expected dimensions. Existing modeling tests pass.

background: Astropy separability_matrix returns a boolean matrix describing which model outputs depend on which inputs.
CompoundModel assembly builds a block matrix from left and right operand matrices. A nested operand may already have meaningful internal separability structure.
The review context includes the pre-patch block assembly excerpt in src-separable.py.

notes: The patch preserves matrix shape but destroys semantics: a nested right-hand CompoundModel already has a separability matrix, and replacing that block with all 1s turns independent outputs into false dependencies.
The proposed test checks only shape. An all-ones block and the correct nested block have the same dimensions, so the test cannot catch the regression.
The right fix must copy the existing nested right matrix into the block and assert exact boolean values for nested-left and nested-right compositions.

learningGoal: 判断矩阵拼接修复是否保留嵌套模型已有结构，而不是只保持 shape。

terms.description: Astropy 中由多个模型组合而成的模型。
输出和输入依赖关系的布尔矩阵。
组合模型时拼接左、右子矩阵。
子模型本身也是组合模型，已有内部结构。

behaviorChecks.expected: 右侧嵌套 block 应保持对角结构。
behaviorChecks.reviewQuestion: 补丁是否保留右侧已有矩阵值？

behaviorChecks.expected: 两个方向都应正确拼接。
behaviorChecks.reviewQuestion: 测试是否覆盖组合顺序和精确矩阵值？
